_meta.description: Manual review queue for high-priority people-to-entity linking. Generated from current people.json and live entities.json.
_meta.methodology: Includes top-ranked unlinked donors first. Candidate entity matches are conservative heuristic suggestions from exact or distinctive employer-to-entity alias overlap and are not accepted links until reviewed.
